_comment: SendGrid dynamic template for the Terror Zone Notifier. In SendGrid: Email API > Dynamic Templates > Create template > Add Version > Code Editor, then paste 'html_content'. Set the version Subject to {{subject}}. 'test_data' is sample dynamic data for the preview. After creating, copy the template id (starts with d-...) into the SENDGRID_TEMPLATE_ID app setting.
name: Terror Zone Notifier — diabolical v1
subject: {{subject}}
html_content:
{{#if hasWindows}} {{else}} {{/if}}
Terror Zones Today
{{dateLabel}}
{{#each groups}} {{#each this.windows}} {{/each}}
{{this.boss}}
{{this.zone}}
{{this.time}}
{{#if this.immunities}}{{/if}}
Immunities{{this.immunities}}
Boss packs{{this.packs}}
Super uniques{{this.uniques}}
{{/each}}
{{#if isFeedGap}}
The Sightless Eye is blind
The d2emu feed had no slots for today ({{dateLabel}}). It may be stale or its horizon has run out — check d2emu.com/tz-sp.
{{else}}
The realms are quiet
None of your tracked terror zones walk abroad today ({{dateLabel}}).
{{/if}}
All times local · Source: d2emu.com single-player calendar
